segments.text: My heart is steadfast, O God! I will sing and make melody with all my being!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Awake, O harp and lyre! I will awake the dawn!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will give thanks to you, O LORD, among the peoples; I will sing praises to you among the nations.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For your steadfast love is great above the heavens; your faithfulness reaches to the clouds.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Be exalted, O God, above the heavens! Let your glory be over all the earth!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: That your beloved ones may be delivered, give salvation by your right hand and answer me!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: God has promised in his holiness: 'With exultation I will divide up Shechem and portion out the Valley of Succoth.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Gilead is mine; Manasseh is mine; Ephraim is my helmet; Judah is my scepter.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Moab is my washbasin; upon Edom I cast my shoe; over Philistia I shout in triumph.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who will bring me to the fortified city? Who will lead me to Edom?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Have you not rejected us, O God? You do not go out, O God, with our armies.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Oh grant us help against the foe, for vain is the salvation of man!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: With God we shall do valiantly; it is he who will tread down our foes.
segments.speaker: David
